SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-27-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUSTIN SWASEY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT PETER WATLER IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3225 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF FROM THE DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY, AAA. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JAN-27-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
